About Us

Kerala's Trusted Electrical Engineering Partner

Founded with a commitment to safety, quality, and client satisfaction, Bright Electrical and Engineering Works has grown into one of Kerala's most trusted electrical contractors — serving residential, commercial, and industrial clients across the state.

Our Story

Built on a Foundation of Expertise and Trust

Bright Electrical and Engineering Works was established with a clear vision: to provide safe, high-quality electrical services that Kerala's homes, businesses, and industries could rely on. Based in Chungathara, Nilambur, in the heart of Malappuram district, we serve clients across the length and breadth of Kerala.

Over the years, we have completed over 500 projects ranging from simple domestic wiring to complex industrial power installations. Every project, regardless of size, receives the same level of care, attention, and professionalism that defines our work.

Our team of licensed, KEB-certified electricians stays updated with the latest safety standards, technologies, and best practices in electrical engineering — ensuring every installation is built to last and fully compliant.

12+

Years Experience

Our Values

What Drives Everything We Do

Safety First
Every installation follows Kerala Electricity Board standards. We never cut corners on safety — not for speed, not for cost.
Quality Workmanship
We use only ISI-marked, certified materials. Our team takes pride in clean, precise, lasting installations.
Client Focused
We listen before we act. Every project begins with understanding your specific needs, budget, and timeline.
Transparent Pricing
Detailed quotations, no hidden charges, no surprises. You always know exactly what you're paying for.
